title: Database Administration (SQL)
description:
Database Management & Operations

  • Install, configure, upgrade, and maintain relational database systems including Oracle, SQL Server, MySQL, and PostgreSQL.

  • Manage databases in on-premises, hybrid, and cloud environments (AWS RDS, Azure SQL).

  • Ensure high availability, reliability, and performance of database platforms supporting business-critical systems.

Backup, Recovery & Disaster Recovery

  • Design, implement, and maintain backup and recovery strategies using native tools (SQL Server Agent).

  • Test and maintain disaster recovery (DR) and business continuity solutions such as replication, clustering, Multi-AZ, and geo-replication.

  • Perform regular restore testing and DR drills to ensure data integrity and recoverability.

Performance Tuning & Monitoring

  • Monitor database performance using tools such as OEM Cloud Control, CloudWatch, Azure Monitor, Performance Insights, and third-party tools.

  • Conduct query tuning, index optimization, and execution plan analysis.

  • Perform capacity planning and proactively identify performance bottlenecks.

Security & Compliance

  • Manage database security by configuring users, roles, privileges, and role-based access control (RBAC).

  • Apply regular patches, updates, and security fixes to ensure compliance and system stability.

  • Support audit requirements and enforce data protection and confidentiality standards.

Cloud & Migration Support

  • Assess on-premises databases for cloud readiness and support migrations to AWS RDS and Azure SQL.

  • Manage cloud database features such as read replicas, automated backups, failover, and scaling.

  • Support hybrid cloud architectures and data migration initiatives.

Automation & Scripting

  • Develop and maintain scripts for automation of backups, monitoring, maintenance, and reporting.

  • Schedule and automate routine database maintenance tasks such as integrity checks and statistics updates.

Support & Collaboration

  • Provide L1/L2 database support for production and non-production environments.

  • Troubleshoot database issues

  • Collaborate with application developers on schema design, data modeling, and SQL optimization.

  • Participate in root cause analysis and continuous improvement initiatives.

Technical Skills

  • Strong experience with Oracle, SQL Server, MySQL, and PostgreSQL.

  • Hands-on experience with AWS RDS and Azure SQL Database.

  • Expertise in backup, recovery, performance tuning, and database security.

  • Knowledge of high availability and DR solutions (replication, Data Guard, clustering).

  • Proficiency in SQL scripting and database automation.

  • Experience with Unix/Linux system administration.

Education & Certifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field.

  • Relevant certifications are a plus (Oracle OCP, Azure Database Administrator, AWS certifications).

Interested applicants please send your resume to venessagoh@recruitexpress.com.sg

Venessa Goh Wee Ni

R24124686

Recruit Express Pte Ltd

EA License No: 99C4599

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
